name: UI Skills Root
description: Routing skill for the ui-skills catalog — discover and install the smallest useful UI skill.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill ui-skills-root -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill ui-skills-root -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill ui-skills-root -a codex -g -y
install.vscode: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill ui-skills-root -a github-copilot -g -y
